text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe directly writing to prefetch files for system utilities (cmd.exe, powershell.exe, whoami.exe, wmiprvse.exe) is highly unusual. The prefetcher (a kernel component) typically manages these files, not a user-mode process like svchost.exe. The execution of these specific utilities in quick succession is also indicative of reconnaissance or command execution.",
  "indicators": [
    "prefetch",
    "cmd.exe",
    "powershell.exe",
    "conhost.exe",
    "wmiprvse.exe",
    "whoami.exe",
    "svchost.exe"
  ]
}
